mapper.select: SELECT BBS_ID FROM TB_BBS_USE WHERE TRGET_ID = #{cmmntyId}
SELECT BBS_ID FROM TB_BBS_USE WHERE TRGET_ID = #{clbId}
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_BBS_USE SET USE_AT = 'N', LAST_UPDUSR_ID = #{lastUpdusrId}, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = NOW() WHERE TRGET_ID = #{cmmntyId}
UPDATE TB_BBS_USE SET USE_AT = 'N', LAST_UPDUSR_ID = #{lastUpdusrId}, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = NOW() WHERE TRGET_ID = #{clbId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_BBS_USE (BBS_ID, TRGET_ID, REGIST_SE_CODE, USE_AT, FRST_REGISTER_ID, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM ) VALUES (#{bbsId}, #{trgetId}, #{registSeCode}, #{useAt}, #{frstRegisterId}, NOW())
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(a.BBS_ID) FROM TB_BBS_USE a LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_BBS_MASTER e ON a.BBS_ID = e.BBS_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CMMN_DETAIL_CODE b ON b.CODE = a.REGIST_SE_CODE WHERE b.CODE_ID = 'COM001' AND a.REGIST_SE_CODE != 'REGC07'
AND e.BBS_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchWrd} || '%'

SELECT a.BBS_ID, e.BBS_NM, a.TRGET_ID, a.REGIST_SE_CODE, b.CODE_NM as REGIST_SE_CODE_NM, a.USE_AT, a.FRST_REGISTER_ID, v.USER_NM AS FRST_REGISTER_NM,
TO_CHAR(a.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, '시스템 활용' CMMNTY_ID, '시스템 활용' CMMNTY_NM, '시스템 활용' CLB_ID, '시스템 활용' CLB_NM, '시스템 활용' BBS_TY_CODE FROM TB_BBS_USE a LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_BBS_MASTER e ON a.BBS_ID = e.BBS_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CMMN_DETAIL_CODE b ON b.CODE = a.REGIST_SE_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN VW_USER_MASTER v ON v.ESNTL_ID = a.FRST_REGISTER_ID WHERE b.CODE_ID = 'COM001' AND a.BBS_ID = #{bbsId} AND a.TRGET_ID = #{trgetId}
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_BBS_USE SET USE_AT = #{useAt}, LAST_UPDUSR_ID = #{lastUpdusrId}, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = NOW() WHERE BBS_ID = #{bbsId}
UPDATE TB_BBS_USE SET USE_AT = 'N', LAST_UPDUSR_ID = #{lastUpdusrId}, LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = NOW() WHERE BBS_ID = #{bbsId}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(tt.BBS_ID) FROM ( SELECT a.BBS_ID, d.USER_NM FROM TB_BBS_USE a LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_BBS_MASTER b ON a.BBS_ID = b.BBS_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CMMN_DETAIL_CODE c ON c.CODE = a.REGIST_SE_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_EMPLYR_INFO d ON a.TRGET_ID = d.ESNTL_ID WHERE a.BBS_ID IN ( SELECT BBS_ID FROM TB_BBS_USE WHERE TRGET_ID = #{trgetId} AND USE_AT ='Y' ) AND a.REGIST_SE_CODE = 'REGC07' UNION ALL SELECT a.BBS_ID, '[전체]' USER_NM FROM TB_BBS_USE a LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_BBS_MASTER b ON a.BBS_ID = b.BBS_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CMMN_DETAIL_CODE c ON c.CODE = a.REGIST_SE_CODE WHERE a.BBS_ID IN ( SELECT BBS_ID FROM TB_BBS_USE WHERE TRGET_ID = #{trgetId} ) AND a.REGIST_SE_CODE in ('REGC05', 'REGC06') UNION ALL SELECT a.BBS_ID, '' as USER_NM FROM TB_BBS_USE a LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_BBS_MASTER b ON a.BBS_ID = b.BBS_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CMMN_DETAIL_CODE c ON c.CODE = a.REGIST_SE_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CMMNTY_USER e ON e.CMMNTY_ID = #{trgetId} LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CLUB_USER f ON f.CLB_ID = #{trgetId} LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_EMPLYR_INFO g ON e.EMPLYR_ID = g.ESNTL_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_EMPLYR_INFO h ON f.EMPLYR_ID = h.ESNTL_ID WHERE a.BBS_ID IN ( SELECT BBS_ID FROM TB_BBS_USE WHERE TRGET_ID = #{trgetId} AND USE_AT ='Y' ) AND a.REGIST_SE_CODE in ('REGC05', 'REGC06') AND ( (a.BBS_ID, e.EMPLYR_ID) not in (SELECT BBS_ID, TRGET_ID FROM TB_BBS_USE) OR (a.BBS_ID, f.EMPLYR_ID) not in (SELECT BBS_ID, TRGET_ID FROM TB_BBS_USE) ) ) tt
WHERE tt.USER_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchWrd} || '%'
